title: SΔϕ-07 - H_min: Interpretation Minimal Axioms
package_title: SΔϕ-07 - H_min: Interpretation Minimal Axioms AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / H_min interpretation minimal axioms audit module
core_claim: DeltaPhi does not automatically become subject, memory, time, meaning, or responsibility. DeltaPhi must pass through a minimal interpretation layer: H_min.

primary_formulae.core: H_min(DeltaPhi) = Trace Detection + Difference Registration + Boundary Assignment + Temporal Ordering + Subject/Object Positioning + Meaning Stabilization + Re-entry Availability
primary_formulae.warning: Interpretation is not identical to operation, memory, time, subject, responsibility, or truth.

do_not_use_as: proof that every trace has settled meaning
replacement for TCC analysis when interpretive transition cost is central
